title: Sweet Shattering British Sausage Wrap
description: A sweet and savory British dish featuring Cornish sausage, orange juice, and a crispy ssam wrap, perfect for curing hangovers. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is served on a bamboo tray.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook the Cornish sausage links until browned on all sides.
In a small bowl, whisk together the orange juice and honey until well combined.
Brush the ssam wrap sheets with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
In a separate pan, scramble the eggs and set aside.
Add the cooked sausage links to the orange juice mixture and toss to coat.
Place a cooked sausage link onto each ssam wrap sheet, leaving a small border around the edges.
Top each sausage link with a spoonful of scrambled eggs, if using.
Drizzle any remaining orange juice mixture over the top of each wrap.
Serve the Sweet Shattering British Sausage Wraps on a bamboo tray and enjoy immediately.
